titleStmt.title: SII 33.172: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 172. (A.R. No. B 278 of 1950.) Turimella, Cumbum Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Slab in a field on the way to Mādhavāpuram-Śrōtriyam, about 1(1/2) miles N.E. of the village.
This is dated Śaka 1314, Āṅgīrasa, Āshāḍha śu. 15, Friday. Irregular.

Damaged. Records the construction of a tank and the assignment of lands under it to various families who took part in its construction including the Karaṇams, in Turimella when Kaṭhāri Sāḷuva Guṇḍayadēva Mahārāja was ruling over Tuṟimiḷa-rājya and Dēvaraya, son of the king, was ruling over the Udayagiri-rājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śakavarṣaṁ
bulu 1314 Agunēṁṭi Āṁgirasa saṁvatsa
ra Āṣāḍha nu 15 su svasti śrīmaṁnmahāmaṁḍa
lēśvara Arirāya vibāḷabhāṣaka tappuvarāya
ragaṁḍa pūrvapaścimadakṣaṇa samu
drādipatiyaina śrīvīraharihararāya
Oḍayalu prithivirājyamu sēyucuṁ
ḍagānu Āyana kumāruṁḍu dēvarāya Oḍayalu
Udayagirini rājyamu sēyucuṁḍagānu svasti śrī
manmahāmaṁḍaleśvara mīsaragaṁḍakaṭhāri sāḷuva guṁ
ḍayadēva mahārājulu tuṟimiḷarājyamu sē
yucuṁḍa Āyūri prajalugulabramireḍigulakoṁ
ḍa Ākudoṁṭi nāgāya Akamacavuṁḍaya
ya cilamareḍi siṁgana Aṁbireḍini vīru mukhyamayina
samasta prajalakuṁnnu Ānaticcina śāsanamu
ṁki Aṭaviceṟuvu venaka sa mē
ṟu nanu krottagāṁgaṭṭina yi ki kāṁ
pu ku mūṁḍu pāḷuṁ vāriki li khā kō
ru gonu vāraṁ Aṁ kāṁpuku
reṁḍupāḷuṁnu le kōrugonu
vāraṁ Āyaṁkāla Āḍā ṁgonu vā
ramu dasavaṁdamu marutulu mānya
mu reṁḍu ma liṁcuvāru braṁhmā
devaraku pāliṁcuḍi ce vāraṁ yī ceṟuvunaku
mīru krottagānu guṁdakaṁ nu mōgavāḷaṁ veḍiceṟu
vuku vaci Aṁdugānu kāluvatvavi saṁmaṁdānaku mū
ṁḍu maṟutuṟlu maḍivaṁ celliṁcuvāraṁ kālu
vaku gānu braṁhmadēvaraku tikamaḍi mānyamu celiṁcu
vāraṁ ceruvu kiṁdaṁ baṁḍu polamugāka kāluvanīrane paṁḍi
polamuna sāgināma dasava peṭimaṟuturlukirikiṁ jēsinanu
reṁḍu maṟuturla lekha ṁḍama mānyamu celliṁccu
vāramu braṁhma ceṟuvugaṭṭē nimityamai pādika ma
ḍiṁni kāluva tavē nimityamai pādika maḍiṁ vūraṁgara
ṇālu janamu gurakuṁnu Aḍḍamaḍiṁna verasi marutu
ṟu maḍiṁni celliṁci vāraṁ yīmaryyadanu le
syayi ve peṭisukhalābālu Anubhavi
ṁcuvāru maṁgaḷamahā śrī śrī śrī
śrī boṁmareḍiyeku reṁḍu lakkeṁḍi reḍiye
caṁvu vuḍayeru rā yayeru Ākuṁ
nāgā ye Aṁbireḍḍi śiṁgavā ru Āreḍiyeru
ṁpōrana nu yeṟuvakasave Are ve cuna nāgaṁgāru
turu bayana reṁḍupāḷu gopiseṭi
malu ye velivo pedatippana yerugomireḍi śiṁgana
yeru A kabōyuyēru mālakāṇa yērukāla śiga
nayerubōyini lu yeru ceruvu venakanu velivōliya
purāri Areru maṁgaḷa śirugōju
svadattaṁ dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ
paradattānapahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēttu
dēvamahārājuluṁnnu ceṟuvu
luvakuṁnnu kartalayina reḍluṁnnu praja
cāri tipparāju śrīgiriki pādikamaḍi
dośipeṭiri Ācaṁdrārkkastāhamugānu ce
la ṁgaladi maṁgaḷamahā śrī śrī śrī
la ceruvugaṭina saṁmastaraṁkṣaya This line engraved on the top of the inscription.
Digital edition of SII 33.172 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
